strategy_reasoning: A 3-part carousel allows us to visually separate the sheer volume of updates (Nomnom eating PRs), the new models/SDK features (Robot analyzing outputs), and the backend infra stability (Polly tending the server garden). Retro UI panels integrate the text organically without ruining the cozy aesthetic.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art, soft pastel gradients, Stardew Valley aesthetic, warm lighting, chunky sprites, prominent lime green (#ecf874) accents.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan mochi-ball creature with tiny dot eyes and wide happy mouth eagerly eating a huge stack of paper documents and code snippets. The cute pixel art bee mascot with yellow and brown stripes, tiny blush marks, and a little manager visor hovers nearby checking off a retro clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Floating retro UI panels with pixel-font text: 'WEEKLY WRAP' and '41 PRs'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
images.description: Nomnom eating through the massive backlog of 41 PRs and community apps.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art hackerspace scene. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head sits at a retro terminal, the screen glowing lime green (#ecf874) showing audio waves and a generated picture. The robot looks excited with square pixel eyes. The cute pixel art bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt hovers nearby holding a wrench. Soft mint and peach pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like A Short Hike. Retro wooden signboards in the background with pixel-font text: 'Suno-v5' and 'Flux-2-Dev'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
images.description: The Robot discovering the new Suno and Flux capabilities while Polly upgrades the SDK.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a digital garden where server racks look like wooden trellises. The cute pixel art bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's straw hat is watering the servers, causing glowing code-plants to sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft warm cream and pastel pink gradient background. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. A retro RPG quest log panel hangs in the corner with pixel-font text: 'Infra Tuned' and 'Bugs Squashed'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
images.description: Polly solo, peacefully tending to the backend infrastructure and fixing bugs.

caption:
41 PRs merged this week. The community showcase is officially overflowing—we merged over 20 new apps, ranging from fitness companions to Jungian chat bots.

Under the hood, we wired up Suno-v5, Flux-2-dev, and Step-3.5-flash via api.airforce. The NPM SDK got a solid QoL bump with new STT and media upload features.

Plus the usual housekeeping: better abuse detection, normalizing finish reasons, and stopping the model monitor from counting 4xx errors against success rates. The garden is growing. 🌱

Full changelog on GitHub.
alt_text: A carousel of three cozy pixel art images. First, a round mochi creature eats a stack of 41 PRs while a bee with a clipboard watches. Second, a robot with a monitor head looks at audio waves and images on a lime green screen while the bee holds a wrench. Third, the bee wears a straw hat and waters server racks that are sprouting glowing code-plants.
